v1_0.name: tinyfarm 1.0
v1_0.description: The original tinyfarm with core environmental monitoring — temperature, humidity, and CO₂ sensors for automated growing.

v1_5.name: tinyfarm 1.5
v1_5.description: Updated hardware with new fluid level sensors and an onboard LED status screen for at-a-glance device info.

flash.title: Update {device}
flash.subtitle: Plug your tinyfarm into your computer with a USB cable, then press the button below.
flash.warning: This will erase the device and install fresh software. Any saved WiFi details will be removed.
flash.unsupported: This feature only works in Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge. Please open this page in one of those browsers.
flash.notAllowed: Something is blocking the connection. Make sure the page address starts with https://.

wifi.title: WiFi details (optional)
wifi.ssidHint: Must match exactly — including capital letters and spaces. Only 2.4 GHz networks are supported.
wifi.tip: Tip: it's easier to connect WiFi directly from the tinyfarm — it can scan and show available networks.
